scripts.start: node -e "console.error('This frontend is served by the FastAPI backend. Use docker compose up --build -d from the project root, or npm run dev for frontend-only development.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.serve:e2e: npm run build && cd ../backend && uv run python -c "import os, pathlib, tempfile, uvicorn; db_path = pathlib.Path(tempfile.gettempdir()) / 'pm-e2e.sqlite3'; db_path.unlink(missing_ok=True); os.environ.setdefault('SESSION_SECRET', 'test-e2e-session-secret'); os.environ['DATABASE_PATH'] = str(db_path); uvicorn.run('app.main:app', host='127.0.0.1', port=3100)"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
